research.description: Initial scoping, justification, and strategic planning. Ensures proportionality and legal compliance.

templates.title: Case Decision & Collection Log
templates.purpose: Define operational goals, identify knowledge gaps, output an Intelligence Collection Plan

templates.title: Investigation Strategy & Intelligence Requirement Plan
templates.purpose: Define intelligence requirements, collection strategies, priority lines of enquiry, resource allocation

templates.title: Source & Credibility Grader
templates.purpose: Filter raw data entering the intelligence cycle using Admiralty 6x6 grading

templates.title: Genealogical & Family Network Research
templates.purpose: Deep research enforcing the Genealogical Proof Standard for family/associate networks

templates.title: Cultural Context & Ethnographic Background Assessment
templates.purpose: Rapid ethnographic assessment mapping identity structures, power hierarchies, and community norms

analysis.description: Processing tools that synthesise structured data into patterns, identify gaps, and test competing theories.

templates.title: Analysis of Competing Hypotheses (ACH)
templates.purpose: Test evidence against mutually exclusive hypotheses using the Inconsistency Principle

templates.title: Chronological Matrix
templates.purpose: Normalise disjointed events into UTC-standardised timeline, highlight temporal gaps

templates.title: Network Architecture (Edge List)
templates.purpose: Relationship mapping outputting structured tabular data for link analysis

templates.title: Entity Extraction & Profiling (POLE)
templates.purpose: Parse raw text into structured records using POLE schemas

templates.title: Content Verification Report
templates.purpose: Authenticate photos/videos via reverse image search, geolocation, chronolocation

templates.title: Economic History & Urban Morphological Analysis
templates.purpose: Analyse site/regional economic evolution using urban morphology and spatial econometrics

database.description: Central repository templates ensuring every piece of data maintains strict provenance and lineage.

templates.title: Entity Register
templates.purpose: Structured database of all persons, organisations, and locations with universal metadata

templates.title: Task Log & Actions Register
templates.purpose: Continuous log of every investigative enquiry, assignment, and outcome including negative results

templates.title: Evidence & Material Register
templates.purpose: Register for captured evidence with cryptographic hashes, capture details, and storage locations

templates.title: Subject & Corporate Profiles
templates.purpose: Consolidated findings on specific targets: identity, employment, digital footprints, ownership chains

working.description: Final delivery mechanism and live working documents for rapid consumption by decision-makers.

templates.title: Analytical Briefing (ICD 203)
templates.purpose: BLUF-structured report strictly separating facts, assumptions, and judgements

templates.title: Case Summary Record
templates.purpose: High-level administrative overview of case reference, scope, and status

templates.title: Findings Memo
templates.purpose: Practitioner format summarising confirmed findings, unverified leads, and scope limitations

templates.title: Strategic & Tactical Assessment (NIM)
templates.purpose: Law enforcement templates for force strategy or operational tasking based on current threats

templates.title: Account Attribution Report
templates.purpose: SOCMINT brief profiling a social media account with evidence supporting real-world identity attribution

templates.title: Investigation Notebook
templates.purpose: Live workspace maintained throughout investigation with structured sections and free-form notepad
